      Purchase options and add-ons

      Sign in to continue
      • The first professional and hobbyist poker set. The SLOWPLAY engineering and design teams spent 18 months building this product, and every detail has been crafted with the upmost attention to help players enjoy the game that they love. It reflects good taste and fine quality, making the poker chips set an ideal gift for poker enthusiasts.
      • Chip Carrying Case: We’re re-defining what a good case should look like. The outer shell is made of German Polycarbonate material, crafted from one-piece injection molding, making it extremely durable. It also includes a custom aluminum alloy frame, zinc alloy lock, and large handle. The hand-made chips feature inner support, and PU leather packaging materials. Super portable with full-body black material.
      • Chips: Exquisite craftsmanship thanks to a double injection, iron core, and a weight of 14 grams. The design of the chip was inspired by the Art Deco style of the early 20th century. The symmetrical and simple geometric composition perfectly combine the grandeur of the roaring 1920s and contemporary simplicity to elevate the poker experience to a new level.
      • Quantity Ratio: Based on the actual usage ratio of the number of chips, the 300-chip set meets the needs of a 7-8 person game, and 500 chips easily meet the needs for 9-10 people.
      • Product details: 500 PCS FULL SET: $1-100 Chips, $5-150 Chips, $25-100 Chips, $100-100 Chips,$500-25 Chips,$1000-25 Chips. The diameter for each chip is 40mm.All poker sets include: 2 decks of SLOWPLAY plastic playing cards and 1 dealer. (We do not provide small blind and big blind button.)
      › See more product details

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these poker chips to be of excellent quality, with a heavy weight and pleasant feel in their hands. They appreciate the handsome design, durability, and value for money. The case receives positive feedback for its high quality.
      AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

      123 customers mention quality, 118 positive, 5 negative123 customers mention "Quality"118 positive5 negative
      Customers find the poker chip set to be of good quality, with one customer noting there are no imperfections or blemishes.
      "Exactly as advertised and great quality. Hosted a poker night right away when I received my set and this set was a definite hit with my poker friends." Read more
      "...have used this for hundreds of poker nights and it is definitely high quality." Read more
      "...The set is pretty heavy. Heavier than I expected. Seems like good quality but for that price I guess I was expecting a bit more...." Read more
      "I bought two sets of these poker chips. It's a great set. It feels just like casino chips...." Read more
      62 customers mention weight, 49 positive, 13 negative62 customers mention "Weight"49 positive13 negative
      Customers appreciate the weight of these poker chips, noting they are heavy and well-made.
      "Man is this thing heavy. Good quality chips, design, and case. No doubt this will last for a long time." Read more
      "This set is very nice! The chips are heavy and have a nice touch to them. If you’re thinking of getting a poker set, I would highly recommend this!" Read more
      "High quality chip with great weight. Bright colors with no variance. No damage to any individual chip. Good uniformity...." Read more
      "...Like the headline said... The kit is heavy." Read more
      40 customers mention chip quality, 34 positive, 6 negative40 customers mention "Chip quality"34 positive6 negative
      Customers appreciate the quality of these poker chips, describing them as solid and casino-style, with one customer noting they handle beautifully.
      "Great Chips!!!!! No regrets" Read more
      "...Overall, I'm very happy with my purchase. Chips are high quality with very few manufacturing defects (there are bound to be some in a set this size)...." Read more
      "An extra gram or two really makes a difference. This is a nice set of chips." Read more
      "I was very impressed with the case and quality of the chips. It would be nice to see an option to select the chip denominations for a set...." Read more
      38 customers mention design, 38 positive, 0 negative38 customers mention "Design"38 positive0 negative
      Customers appreciate the design of these poker chips, describing them as handsome, with one customer noting their blank appearance.
      "This beautiful set is going to be tried out this weekend and I can't wait! It arrived packaged well. The case is SUPER strong and durable...." Read more
      "...The case is very well made, beautiful, and grade higher than the cheap, aluminum cases I had before...." Read more
      "Solid quality material and design it’s just luxury to be proud of, even the finishing from the moment you touch the suitcase till you feel the chips..." Read more
      "...The colors are bright an elegant and solid. Has some weight on em which is nice, and glide with ease...." Read more
      33 customers mention durability, 26 positive, 7 negative33 customers mention "Durability"26 positive7 negative
      Customers find the poker chips sturdy, with one customer noting they stay together well and another mentioning no damage to individual chips.
      "We hold poker night once a week and these are great. Case is heavy but sturdy. Chips are perfect weight and everyone loves the quality...." Read more
      "...No damage to any individual chip. Good uniformity. Case is sturdy and is heavy due to the quality and weight of the chips. Great feel and sound." Read more
      "...It arrived packaged well. The case is SUPER strong and durable. The chips are exquisite quality!..." Read more
      "Very nice chips. Latches came undone while carrying the case. Update - The company replaced my old case. They have resolved this issue on new cases." Read more
      31 customers mention feel, 31 positive, 0 negative31 customers mention "Feel"31 positive0 negative
      Customers appreciate the poker chips' feel, describing them as pleasant to hold and very nice to the touch, with one customer noting their solid and hefty construction.
      "...Great feel and seem to be very durable 14g clay so they should last for years of playing fun" Read more
      "...The case is also super sturdy and the chips have a great weight and feel...." Read more
      "These chips feel great, look great and sound great. The case was much heavier than expected however just what I wanted...." Read more
      "Great quality chips Good feel highly recommend Love the card as well" Read more
      30 customers mention value for money, 26 positive, 4 negative30 customers mention "Value for money"26 positive4 negative
      Customers find these poker chips to be worth the price.
      "Overall a set that worth the price, I like the quality of the chips, and the rose gold dealer button, it’s cool!..." Read more
      "...Worth the money for anyone who loves playing poker. Would love to see these clay pieces made for dominos game as well." Read more
      "...My friends loved the very solid carrying case as well. Good price as well. Need 1,000 chips buy two! 💯 percent recommend!..." Read more
      "...but Maybe I got a bad set. for the most part it was good value" Read more

      5 out of 5 stars
      Above and beyond
      These exceeded my expectations. The CORE set is what I use to avoid buying in pieces. Altho I did buy a bit more of the 25 separately. You will not be sorry about paying more if you're into poker chips. ONE THING I was not crazy about the cards but they are plastic so that's cool. Awesome presentation and case. Two day delivery.

      There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

      • Chief of Stuff
        5.0 out of 5 stars Very happy with quality and customer service (though color blind beware)
        Reviewed in the United States on December 31, 2025
        Color: Black GoldSize: 500PCS Numbered Core Set (5, 25, 100, 500)Verified Purchase
        - Exceptional quality. The players at my game all commented on how the chips felt and the build quality.
        - Customer service: one piece was missing its label. I emailed them at the address on their site and they responded within hours and offered to replace any chips that were defective. It shipped out the next day.
        - The cards that come with it are very slick. They ended up on the floor a few times when trying to shuffle them. We're going to get an automatic shuffler to help but the quality of them is fantastic.
        - Other comparable sets include dice. I have no need for them so didn't miss them.
        - I did, however, miss the Big Blind and Small Blind tokens. I wish this set included them.
        - Weight: I can confirm (if it matters) that the chips are 14-grams per my kitchen scale. The total weight of the set is enough that it arrive with HEAVY stickers all over it. You'd know if you dropped it on your foot.
        - One other note: I'm color blind and the blue/purple chips are very hard to tell apart especially in the dim lighting of a poker game. I bought the set with labels which helps but when I scan the table, it's not immediately clear what my opponents have. Higher contrast colors would be smart.
        - The case is solid quality plastic.
        - The Dealer button is very nice and high quality. Feels very premium.
        Read more
        Helpful
         Report
      • The Saint
        5.0 out of 5 stars Casino Feel Right at Home
        Reviewed in the United States on September 14, 2025
        Color: Black GoldSize: 500PCS Numbered Full Set (1,5,25,100,500,1000)Verified Purchase
        These poker chips are excellent quality and have that solid weight that makes the game feel legit. The Art Deco design looks sharp, and the numbered values make it easy to keep the game organized. The carrying case is sturdy and keeps everything neat, so setup and cleanup are quick. Definitely gives poker night a more professional feel.

        My first poker night with these chips was amazing! My friends loved them.

        Pros: Heavy 14g chips, stylish design, clear numbered values, sturdy carrying case, great for home games.
        Cons: Case is a bit heavy when fully loaded, but that’s the trade-off for real casino-style chips.
        Read more
        One person found this helpful

      • rob
        5.0 out of 5 stars Great quality
        Reviewed in Canada on October 3, 2023
        Color: Black GoldSize: 500PCS Numbered Full Set (1,5,25,100,500,1000)Verified Purchase
        The chips are amazing. They feel like casino chips and have a good weight to them. The case is also very nice and the quality of the cards themselves is also great. The dealer chip is a full metal coin, and looks very attractive. My only complaint would be that the case should include a big and little blind chip (since this is a quality set and you pay a premium for that).

        All in all, this is well worth the money and i am very happy with this set and its quality.
        Read more
